g.text: any violation from overlaps / contrast / alignment / connectors / css
every finding is a defect until classified
the rule: fix first, defend only as exception
e.g. banner gradient IS the design
designer overrides checker, once, with reason
human reading required, checker is blind
every violation classified - no bulk dismissal, no silent passes
validator output pasted in response with each classification
FAIL-FIRST VALIDATION - EVERY FINDING INDIVIDUALLY CLASSIFIED
